ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_types" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media type */,
  "media_name" TEXT /* Name of the media source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media source */,
  "media_category" TEXT /* Categorize media types */,
  "bias_rating" REAL /* Subjective rating of media bias */,
  "trustworthiness" REAL /* Measure of media trustworthiness */,
  "audience_demographics" TEXT /* Description of target audience demographics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media consumption record */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media type */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing time_periods */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period of the data collection */,
  "mean_usage" REAL /* Mean usage of the media type */,
  "sd_usage" REAL /* Standard deviation of usage */,
  "correlation_over_time" REAL /* Correlation coefficient of usage over time */,
  "correlation_with_conspiracy_belief" REAL /* Correlation coefficient with conspiracy belief index */,
  "mean_engagement" REAL /* Measure of engagement */,
  "engagement_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of engagement */,
  "correlation_with_sentiment" REAL /* Correlation coefficient with sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_consumption_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_types ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_consumption_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "period_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the time period */,
  "event_flags" TEXT /* Flags for significant events during the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical record */,
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media consumption record */,
  "t_value" REAL /* t-value of the paired difference */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the t-value */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistical analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Description of the statistical analysis method used */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the statistical analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumption_id") REFERENCES media_consumption ("consumption_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conspiracy_belief_indices" (
  "belief_index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each belief index record */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media type */,
  "belief_index_value" REAL /* Value of the conspiracy belief index */,
  "index_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the conspiracy belief index */,
  "index_category" TEXT /* Category of the conspiracy belief index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("belief_index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conspiracy_belief_indices_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media_types ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* User's affiliated institution */,
  "department" TEXT /* User's department within the institution */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* User's area of expertise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media consumption record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Geolocation of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_consumption_id FOREIGN KEY ("consumption_id") REFERENCES media_consumption ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
